breakdown: This PR adds CR (CodeRabbit) fallback logic to Skeptic Gates workflows, allowing approval detection via either formal PR reviews or a combination of CI status check + explicit [approve] bot comment. The changes improve robustness of the gate system but consist of shell scripting in YAML workflows with no test coverage.
key_changes: Added fallback CR approval detection using CI status + [approve] comment in skeptic-gate.yml
Added same fallback logic to skeptic-cron.yml for consistency
Added pipeline error handling with 'set +e -o pipefail' to capture jq failures
Expanded user filter from 'coderabbitai[bot]' to include both 'coderabbitai[bot]' and 'coderabbitai'
Added CR_SIGNAL variable to track approval method (APPROVED, APPROVED(status+comment), or FAIL variants)
